arts.ttl: Arsenal captain Odegaard to make history against Fulham
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard is set to mark a significant milestone in his Arsenal career on Sunday, as he prepares to don the captain’s armband for the 100th time when the Gunners face Fulham at Craven Cottage. A win against the London rivals would not only mark Odegaard’s 100th game as captain but also bring Arsenal within four points of league leaders Liverpool, adding further significance to his continued impact on the team’s success.

arts.ttl: How do teams stop Arsenal's set-pieces?
arts.sum: Planet Premier League pundits Statman Dave, Nedum Onuoha and former Arsenal player Gilberto Silva discuss how teams can defend the Gunners' set-pieces.

arts.ttl: Fulham looking to break all-time club scoring record in Arsenal clash as Alex Iwobi aims to continue red-hot form
arts.sum: Fulham will have the chance to set a new club scoring record when they welcome Arsenal to Craven Cottage for Sunday's Premier League contest.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta warns of ‘big challenge’ at Fulham
arts.sum: Arsenal took only one point from last season’s two meetings with the Cottagers.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak sends Arsenal perfect transfer message as Eddie Howe contract stance clear
arts.sum: The 25-year-old striker, who continues to be heavily linked with a move to the Emirates Stadium, etched his name onto the scoresheet during Newcastle United's clash against Brentford. We, of course, love Alex and are desperate for him to stay at Newcastle for many years and score loads of goals for us, but I don't see a short-term issue with his contract.

arts.ttl: Gabriel & Calafiori boost, Martinelli call, 5 changes Arsenal changes vs Fulham
arts.sum: William Saliba was the standout performer against Manchester United, but Arteta singled out squad players Jakub Kiwior and Oleksandr Zinchenko for praise after the game. "We want to have the right to win the games," the Spaniard said in his post-match press conference.

arts.ttl: 'The reality is': Marco Silva shares what Arsenal are 'aware' of that could give them the edge v Fulham tomorrow
arts.sum: Fulham and Arsenal are set to face off in Sunday’s Premier League clash at Craven Cottage. The Cottagers head into the fixture on the back...

arts.ttl: I replaced Van Persie at Arsenal - Arteta must make change to unleash Havertz
arts.sum: Former Arsenal star Lukas Podolski wants to see fellow German Kai Havertz used in a different position by Mikel Arteta. "He does well, but I think when you put Kai behind a good striker he has more potential, but let's see, it's only my view from outside," he told radio station talkSPORT .

arts.ttl: Gary Neville explains Arsenal and Chelsea title race advantage after Everton vs Liverpool off
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea have been handed a psychological advantage in the Premier League title race as a result of wind warnings postponing Everton vs Liverpool, says Gary Neville. I feel sorry for the fans in the US who have woken up early to watch this game and the fans who have travelled to watch the Merseyside derby back in England," Neville reacted to the postponement, appearing on NBC Sports .

arts.ttl: I knew my time at Arsenal was up - now I'm in the form of my life at Fulham
arts.sum: In an interview with The Beautiful Game Podcast, he said: "Arsenal just signed a new winger [Pepe] and there were a few players there who were not ready to go. Fulham star Alex Iwobi will be aiming to continue his scintillating form in front of goal against former club Arsenal on Sunday afternoon .
